claim_title: Pipeline shell runner executes only three Python stages

results.description: Verify shell runner has exactly three python pipeline invocations and STEP x/3 labels.
results.command: calls=$(rg -n "^python scripts/pipeline/" scripts/pipeline/run_complete_pipeline.sh | wc -l); labels=$(rg -n "STEP [0-9]/3" scripts/pipeline/run_complete_pipeline.sh | wc -l); echo "PIPELINE_CALLS=$calls"; echo "STEP_LABELS=$labels"; if [ "$calls" -eq 3 ] && [ "$labels" -eq 3 ]; then echo "ASSERTION=PASS"; else echo "ASSERTION=FAIL"; exit 1; fi
